message:
feat(wal): add WAL metrics counters, tracing span, and error logging (bd-14m.1)

Add WalMetrics with AtomicU64 counters for frames_written, bytes_written,
checkpoint count/duration/backfill, and WAL resets. Add tracing span
'wal_write' to append_frame with frame_count/bytes_written fields. Add
ERROR-level logging on WAL header/frame checksum mismatch and salt
mismatch during open(). Wire checkpoint timing into execute_checkpoint.
7 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
